news.paragraph: The Nasdaq 100 has recently reached new record highs supported by strength in the semiconductor sector, though recent signs of resurgent inflation may provide downward pressure. Traders should watch for the upcoming SpaceX IPO, which could trigger significant inflows into index funds, as well as developments from the ongoing US-China meeting.
